docs.title: Star Org Labs
docs.text:
Run your Star Citizen org like a pro — from Discord to a full web command center. Events, fleet, loot, mining, and org ops in one connected system.

Open the app → Get started

docs.title: Why Star Org Labs?
docs.text:
Running an org is a second job — scheduling ops, chasing signups, tracking who actually showed, splitting loot fairly, keeping the fleet and treasury straight. Star Org Labs pulls all of it into one connected system so you spend less time on spreadsheets and more time flying.

  • Events & Operations

    Plan an op in minutes with a guided event wizard. Members sign up for roles and ships in Discord, you reuse templates for regular runs, track attendance & reliability over time, and settle the haul with the built-in Loot Hub.

  • Fleet & Hangar

    Every member gets a Personal Hangar to register their ships, and leadership gets an Org Fleet Dashboard to see exactly what the org can field.

  • Org Command

    A home base for leadership: member & server dashboards, personnel roster, org structure, a recruitment hub, support tickets, goals, guild points, treasury, and a public website CMS.

  • Industrial

    Tools for the working fleet: mining sessions, a cargo optimizer, the RSIG decoder, a rock calculator, and work orders.

  • Make it yours

    Theme the whole portal to your manufacturer of choice — Aegis, Drake, Origin, RSI, MISC, and more — or set an org-wide look for your members.

  • Lives in Discord

    Signups, reminders, and pings happen right where your members already are. Your leadership commands from the web; your members never leave chat.

docs.title: Ready to launch?
docs.text:
Getting started takes a few minutes and zero installs — sign in with Discord, add the bot, set up your org, and run your first op.

Get started Open the app

starorg.tools  ·  Join the Star Org Labs community

Star Org Labs is a community-built tool and is not affiliated with Cloud Imperium Games or Roberts Space Industries. Star Citizen® is a trademark of Cloud Imperium Rights LLC.

docs.title: Discord Commands
docs.text:
Star Org Labs lives right in your server. Type / in any channel and Discord shows you the bot's commands — but you'll rarely need to memorize them. Most of the action happens through buttons on the event posts. This page is your cheat sheet for when you do want to type.

Who can run what

  • Everyone — no badge.
  • Officer — event and loot organizers.
  • Admin — server owners / configuration.

Officer and Admin are set up by your server's leadership in Server Settings.

docs.title: 🎮 Joining the action
docs.text:
Everything you need to show up and fly.

Command What it does /events See every upcoming op in your org. /event <id> Open a specific event — with buttons to sign up, pick a role, and choose your ship. /join_event <id> Jump straight into an event. /bring_ship <id> Sign up and bring one of your ships to the fight. /verify <handle> Link your RSI handle so your org knows who you are in the 'verse. /timezone <zone> Set your timezone (e.g. America/New_York) so event times show correctly for you.

You mostly just click

Once an event is posted, signing up, choosing a role, and picking a ship all happen with buttons and menus right on the event. /events is usually all you need to type.

docs.title: 🚀 Your fleet & mates
docs.text: Command What it does /fleet status See your fleet and your mates. /fleet add_mate <member> Add someone as a mate in your fleet. /fleet remove_mate <member> Remove a mate.

docs.title: ⛏️ Mining & industry
docs.text:
Available when your server has Mining Tools turned on.

Command What it does /mining start Kick off a live mining session — track yields and crew right from Discord. /mining materials Check current material prices and stats (instability, resistance, and more). /mining rock <signature> [laser_power] Decode an RSIG signature or radar ping — mass, composition, and (with laser power) whether you can crack it.

docs.title: 🎯 Goals & giving back
docs.text: Command What it does /goal pledge <goal_id> <item> <amount> Contribute materials toward one of your org's goals. /ticket create Open a support ticket with your leadership. /ticket close Close your ticket when it's sorted. /boosts See your Patreon boost slots and the servers you sponsor. /guild boost Spend a boost slot to support this server (raises its capacity). /guild unboost Reclaim a boost slot to use somewhere else.

docs.title: Running ops (Officers)
docs.text:
Organize events, templates, recurring runs, and loot.

EventsRecurring eventsLoot Hub Command What it does /create_event <template> <title> [date] [time] Launch an op from a saved template. Defaults to today at 20:00 UTC. /delete_event <id> Cancel an event (notifies signups, cleans up channels). /move_event_crew <id> Pull all confirmed attendees into your voice channel. /refresh_event_embed <id> Repost the event to the top of the channel. /templates List your event templates. /create_template <name> [description] Start a new template, then build it out with buttons. /poll create [title] Post an availability poll to find the best time. Command What it does /recurring list See your recurring schedules. /recurring create <name> <cron> [days] Auto-post an event on a schedule (e.g. every Friday night). /recurring add_template <id> <template> Attach a template to a schedule. /recurring toggle_roulette <id> Randomize which template runs each time. /recurring toggle_active <id> Pause or resume a schedule. Command What it does /loot create <name> [event] [points] [sync_vc] Start a loot session. sync_vc adds everyone in your voice channel. /loot roll <session> Run the fair, weighted roll. /loot next_round <session> [points] Move to the next round and top up points. /wheel <names> [mode] Spin a quick wheel for a random winner — great for giveaways. /goal create_template <template> <qty> Set an org goal from a Wikelo preset. /goal create_custom <name> <reward> <reqs> <qty> Create a fully custom org goal.

docs.title: Setting up the server (Admins)
docs.text:
Command What it does /setup Quickly create the basic channels and roles the bot needs. /settings view Review the current configuration at a glance. /settings set_officer_role <role> Choose which Discord role grants Officer powers. /settings set_admin_role <role> Choose which Discord role grants Admin powers. /settings officers List everyone who currently has Officer powers. /set_officer <member> Grant (or revoke) Officer for one person directly. /settings set_uex_key <key> Add your UEXCorp API key for live market data. /guild status See the server's pooled capacity and who's sponsoring it. /permission Check that the bot has all the permissions it needs here.

Something not working?

If a command doesn't appear, your server may not have that feature enabled, or you may need Officer/Admin. Ask your leadership — or drop into the Star Org Labs community and we'll help you out.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Get your org up and running in a few minutes — no installs, no spreadsheets.

docs.title: 1. Open the app & sign in
docs.text: Head to starorg.tools and sign in with Discord. Star Org Labs uses your Discord account, so there's nothing new to create.

docs.title: 2. Add the bot to your server
docs.text: In the app, use "Add to Server" and pick the Discord server you want to run your org from. You'll need permission to add a bot to that server.

docs.title: 3. Set up your org
docs.text:
From Server Settings, make it yours:

  • Drop in your org logo
  • Pick a theme — your manufacturer's colors, or a look of your own
  • Configure your channels so events and pings land in the right place

docs.title: 4. Run your first op
docs.text: Hit Create Event, build out the roster (roles, ships, teams), and share it. Your members sign up straight from Discord — and you track it all from the web. 🎉

docs.title: What's next?
docs.text:
Explore from the sidebar

  • Events & Ops — templates, recurring events, attendance, the Loot Hub
  • Org Command — roster, structure, recruitment, goals, treasury
  • Industrial — mining sessions, cargo optimizer, work orders

Want the full list of what you can type? See the Discord Commands cheat sheet. More detailed guides — event planning, loot distribution — are on the way. Have a question in the meantime? Ask in the Star Org Labs community.
